headline: Is Entergy (ETR) Pricing Look Attractive After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: Wondering if Entergy at around US$99.90 is offering fair value, a premium, or a possible gap between price and worth? This article focuses squarely on that question. The stock has had a mixed recent run, with a 5.4% decline over the past 7 days and a 2.4% decline over 30 days, set against a 6.4% gain year to date and 22.4% over the past year. Recent news coverage has focused on Entergy as an established US electric utility. Investors are paying close attention to factors such as regulation,...
